primary_surface: Raw app UI Builder editor with split source and Preview panes showing a build failure banner over the preview iframe.
surfaces: Windmill raw app editor header with workspace path, summary, Jobs, AI, Draft, and Deploy actions
Raw app sidebar with frontend files, packages, backend runnables, data tables, lint error, and history sections
UI Builder editor/source iframe in the left pane
Preview tab and preview iframe in the right pane
PR build-error alert positioned over the preview iframe
Preview tab red tint while buildError is present
Bottom-right build logs overlay with collapsible state
Single-tab/collapsed preview mode where the tinted Preview tab is the visible error signal
Successful build state that clears the build-error banner and Preview tab tint
mocked_dependencies: Backend services normally used by the UI Builder bundled artifact
Build logs and seeded buildError postMessage-visible state

verification.runtime: Run a local Vite preview/dev server and inspect the first load plus split/build/log controls.
verification.pr_change: The first load must show a red Build failed banner over the preview pane and red Preview tab tint; toggling split must leave the red Preview tab visible when the preview pane is collapsed.
